text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the<n>plaza...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Halt, citizen! Have you seen any<n>scary bad guys
around here?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I'll... take that as a no. So anotherpeaceful day... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out! I'm suffering the worst<n>woes a
hero could feel right now!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I love peace, and of course I wish for<n>it from the
bottom of my heart...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But I also really, really want tofight against some baddies! I wannafight them and shout out my specialmoves while I'm at it!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I wanna have epic battles like a real<n>hero!
choice_data_list: You'll need to preserve your strength, then.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Awww, what? But my problem is thatI don't wanna do that...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I wanna look cool fighting, just like<n>Carrot
Ranger!
choice_data_list: And is Carrot Ranger always fighting baddies?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. She'd use up all her<n>energy if she
was in hero mode all the<n>time, so she's normally
in her<n>Umamusume form to—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's pretty important for a<n>hero to
preserve her strength too, huh!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, citizen, for teaching me<n>such a
valuable lesson!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying I should prepare for<n>future
battles?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Raaaah! Yeah! That sounds so cool!<n>In order to
prepare for battles, I've<n>gotta do some serious
training!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Like dodging tires careening down a<n>cliff! Or
chasing after Pop's car!
choice_data_list: Don't try this at home, kids.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Relax, I won't go to such extreme<n>lengths.
Especially since Carrot<n>Ranger says not to do
anything<n>dangerous either!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All right! I don't have time to be<n>worrying over
something so silly!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train so that I'm ready to<n>take on any
wrongdoer that appears!<n>Thanks for everything!
